header.title: Health Timeline
header.subtitle: Track your symptoms over time and see pattern-based insights (not diagnosis).

prediction.noSymptoms: No symptoms added yet. Add entries to see pattern and risk.
prediction.noSymptomsRecommendation: If you feel unwell, you should still talk to a real doctor.
prediction.severeMessage: Your timeline includes at least one severe symptom over about {{days}} day(s).
prediction.moderateMessage: You have multiple moderate or long-lasting symptoms over about {{days}} day(s).
prediction.mildMessage: Current symptoms appear mild with limited duration (about {{days}} day(s)).
prediction.highRecommendation: Seek urgent medical care or call emergency services if symptoms worsen.
prediction.mediumRecommendation: Consult a General Physician within 24–48 hours for proper examination.
prediction.lowRecommendation: If symptoms persist, get a routine check-up with your doctor.

possibleConditions.title: Possible Conditions (Not a Diagnosis)
possibleConditions.disclaimer: These suggestions are generated from simple rules based on your symptom timeline. They are only for education and must NOT replace a real doctor's opinion.

viral.name: Viral infection (flu-like illness)
viral.reason: Fever with body aches over a few days can fit a viral infection pattern.
viral.urgencyNote: If fever is high, continues more than 3 days, or you feel very weak, you should see a doctor urgently.

headache.name: Headache disorder (tension / migraine type)
headache.reason: Isolated headache without other red-flag signs can fit a primary headache pattern.
headache.urgencyNote: If headache is sudden, worst-ever, or with weakness, confusion or vision changes, treat as emergency.

cardiac.name: Possible heart-related chest pain (angina type)
cardiac.reason: Chest pain together with shortness of breath is concerning for heart or lung causes.
cardiac.urgencyNote: If pain is severe, crushing, or with sweating/nausea, seek emergency help immediately (e.g. 1122).

anxiety.name: Stress / anxiety component
anxiety.reason: Reported anxiety alongside physical symptoms can amplify how symptoms feel.
anxiety.urgencyNote: Mental health support plus proper medical review is usually most helpful.

unspecified.name: Non-specific symptom pattern
unspecified.reason: This combination of symptoms is too general for even a rough guess inside the app.
unspecified.urgencyNote: A proper in-person doctor assessment is needed to decide what this might be.

timeline.title: Symptom Timeline
timeline.noSymptoms: No symptoms added yet. Click "Add New Symptom" to start your timeline.

form.editingNotice: Editing existing symptom. Make changes and click
